summary: E2E testing of Yoshitaka Karate-Do CMS. Backend: 34/34 pytest tests pass covering auth (login/register/me/logout), RBAC for users/access-codes/payments, QR+barcode, CMS pages, and stats. Frontend: Homepage loads with hero/brush/pillars; super-admin login lands on /dashboard/super-admin with 5 tabs (overview/users/codes/payments/cms) and Member Certificate (QR+barcode); student registration with seeded/new access code creates user and redirects to /dashboard/student showing ID card, payments, and weekly schedule; RBAC blocks student from /dashboard/admin; logout clears session.

issues: Form inputs lack data-testid attributes (access_code, name, phone, email, password) and name attributes. Selection by index works but data-testid would be more robust for future tests.

action_items: [OPTIONAL] Add data-testid attributes to Register page input fields (access-code-input, name-input, phone-input, email-input, password-input) for testability.
[INFO] 401 console errors on homepage are from /api/auth/me probe when no cookie present — cosmetic; could suppress by not calling /me unless cookie exists.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~800 lines in a single file — acceptable for current size but consider splitting into routers (auth.py, users.py, access_codes.py, payments.py, cms.py) once it grows further.
set_auth_cookie uses secure=false (OK for dev as noted); ensure secure=true in production.

CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination. Currently works because frontend/backend share origin via Kubernetes ingress. For production, explicit origins must be configured.
All MongoDB queries correctly exclude _id. JWT uses HS256 with strong secret from env. Password hashing uses bcrypt. Role-based checks consistently applied.
stats endpoint does payments filter in-memory after a large fetch — fine at current scale but could be done via aggregation for >10k payments.
test_credentials: superadmin@yoshitaka.com / SuperAdmin2026! — seeded access codes: GHZ6-WHLZ (student, 10 uses), LCWD-95WP (admin, 3 uses). Tests created additional TEST_ prefixed codes.
seed_data_creation: Tests generated fresh access codes and TEST_ prefixed users/payments through super_admin. No cleanup script added but all data is namespaced with TEST_ for easy filtering.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 34 tests). Student dashboard route is /dashboard/student; Admin /dashboard/admin; Super /dashboard/super-admin. Register form inputs have no name/testid — select by index [0=access_code, 1=name, 2=phone, 3=email, 4=password]. Header logout button (no data-testid) is the last button in header. Access code Create button uses data-testid='code-create-btn'; tab-{overview,users,codes,payments,cms} testids work. idcard-qr and idcard-barcode testids verified present on student dashboard.
